description.en: Attacks an enemy and, with a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance, decreases the target's <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1</color> turns.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>1</color>ターンの間、対象の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>を減少させる。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并以<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的概率在<color=#28d9ed>1</color>回合内降低目标的<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>。

description.en: Attacks an enemy and, with a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance, decreases the target's <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1</color> turns.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>1</color>ターンの間、対象の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>を減少させる。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并以<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的概率在<color=#28d9ed>1</color>回合内降低目标的<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies and, with a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance, decreases their <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1</color> turns.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>1</color>ターンの間、対象の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>を減少させる。
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다
description.zh: 攻击所有敌人,并以<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的概率在<color=#28d9ed>1</color>回合内降低目标的<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nWhen hit by an AoE attack, increases own Priorty by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.\nAt the start of battle, increases <color=#28d9ed>Effectiveness</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2</color> turns.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n全体攻撃を受けた時、自身の行動ゲージが<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>UPする。\n戦闘開始時、<color=#28d9ed>[Turn]</color>ターンの間<color=#28d9ed>効果命中</color>がUPする。
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n전체 공격 피격 시 자신의 행동 게이지를 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가시킵니다.\n전투 시작 시 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>효과 적중</color>이 증가합니다.
description.zh: (被动效果)\n受到全体攻击时,自身行动条增加<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。\n战斗开始时,在<color=#28d9ed>2</color>回合内提高<color=#28d9ed>效果命中</color>。
